name: fiber go template
description: An Express.js inspired web framework build on top of Fasthttp, the fastest HTTP engine for Go. Designed to ease things up for fast development with **zero memory allocation and performance** in mind.
features: Fiber is an Express.js inspired web framework build on top of Fasthttp, the fastest HTTP engine for Go.
Designed to ease things up for fast development with zero memory allocation and performance in mind.
The framework has a robust set of features including routing, middleware support, template engines, and more.
Fiber is ideal for building high-performance web applications and APIs in Go.
